title: neobesseya cubensis
intro: Neobesseya cubensis is a plant species that belongs to the family of plants known as Rubiaceae, commonly referred to as the coffee family. It is a medicinal plant known for its various properties, particularly its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Neobesseya cubensis include the potential treatment of fever, headaches, and other symptoms associated with malaria and other diseases, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce inflammation. In terms of herbal preparations, Neobesseya cubensis can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
